allow: PowerShell(npx -y @angular/cli@latest new wikitimesurfer --directory . --style scss --ssr false --zoneless false --defaults --skip-git 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)

PowerShell(npx ng test --include "**/app.spec.ts" --include "**/timeline.spec.ts" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; "---- app+viewer ----"; npx ng test --include "**/app.spec.ts" --include "**/viewer.spec.ts" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:4377 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — dev server attivo su http://localhost:4377" } catch { "dev server non attivo" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 40;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:4377 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){$ok=$true;break} } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 } }; if\($ok\){"attivo: http://localhost:4377"}else{"non raggiungibile"})
